step_rationale: GPVI signaling initiator kinase; phosphorylates LAT and Syk in collagen response.
mechanism: LYN phosphorylates adapter proteins downstream of GPVI collagen receptor, initiating the signaling cascade that drives platelet activation and thrombus formation.

references.title: Plant-based Food Cyanidin-3-Glucoside Modulates Human Platelet Glycoprotein VI Signaling and Inhibits Platelet Activation and Thrombus Formation.
